title: The Case of Lena Smith
writer: Jules Furthman, Julian Johnson, Samuel Ornitz
actors: Esther Ralston, James Hall, Gustav von Seyffertitz
plot: In late 19th century Vienna, Lena Smith, a naive peasant girl from Hungary, has a child by a corrupt young cavalry officer, and goes to work his house as a servant, hiding the truth from his unsympathetic father, while the son ret...
